props.name: approverSource
props.comment: Record field receiving the current user's id on approve/reject. Default `"approverId"`.

props.name: decidedAtSource
props.comment: Record field receiving the decision timestamp. Default `"decidedAt"`.

props.name: noteSource
props.comment: Record field receiving the optional reason note. Default `"approverNote"`.

props.name: requireReason
props.comment: When true, reject (and approve, if you choose) require a reason note.

props.name: rowExtra
props.comment: Optional custom slot rendered between header and action row.

props.name: statusSource
props.comment: Record field holding the approval status. Default `"status"`.

props.name: titleSource
props.comment: Record field holding the human-readable title. Default `"title"`.
